negative_controls: missing, expired, revoked, cross-tenant, or client-supplied access identity reaches a mart query, artifact retrieval, or mutation
administrator reads private conversation or document content without separately approved break-glass evidence
grant, revocation, publication policy, or access audit row is updated or deleted instead of appended
private app rows bypass RLS or return after cross-tenant object-ID guessing
a contradictory resource privacy shape bypasses the publication policy for a materialized strategy or backtest result
an audit event and its authorization decision carry different tenant identities or expose cross-tenant decision metadata
ordinary app runtime reads administrator audit metadata or either immutable audit base table
AuthorizationService hides publication-policy, authentication-failure, or delegation-revocation inputs required by authorize_access
raw or staging access, arbitrary SQL, model-generated SQL, factor computation, Qlib invocation, or replay execution is introduced
AccessContext, tenant, principal, role, entitlement, or publication-policy metadata enters factor, BacktestDataGateway, DecisionSnapshot, ReplayEventStream, or Qlib types
a default route, release binding, scheduler, live credential, identity-provider request, or Production readiness claim is activated
the experimental access DTOs are exported from the stable truealpha_contracts package root before E2 freeze
